title: Bingtteok Local Food
description: Try Jeju's traditional buckwheat rice cake, rolled around seasoned radish — a taste shaped directly by the island's volcanic soil.
local_story: Jeju's basalt soil couldn't easily support paddy rice, which historically pushed islanders toward buckwheat staples like bingtteok — a dish that's edible local geography.
source_note: This is MVP experience-card data connected to JEJU-KB. It is not a real commercial product listing.
